motion_instability.motion_override: single clear motion beat, stable camera, smooth interpolation, no abrupt transition, no jitter

incomplete_frames.motion_override: minimal motion, stable composition, low-complexity temporal change
positive_append: keep scene simple and stable across full frame sequence

wooden_motion.motion_append: precise gait, shoulder-pelvis coordination, clear weight transfer, avoid mannequin-like motion

emotion_not_visible.motion_append: emotion expressed through posture, gaze, breath rhythm, and gesture timing

multi_character_conflict.motion_append: main character detailed action, secondary characters simplified complementary action, background natural low-amplitude behavior
negative_append: all characters moving with same intensity

positive_append: format block [Scene] with explicit environment anchors and reflective surfaces
camera/action/effect shot progression keeps environment cues persistent
weak_scene_grounding.motion_append: 3-beat shot plan with Camera/Action/Effect to keep scene-action alignment
negative_append: floating subject with no scene interaction
